test-method.name: verify_signin_with_alphanumeric_username

test-method.name: verify_signin_with_minimum_length_password
test-method.description: POS-004: Verify signin with minimum length password

test-method.name: verify_signin_button_enabled_when_fields_filled
test-method.description: POS-005: Verify signin button is enabled when fields are filled

test-method.name: verify_successful_signin_and_user_session
test-method.description: POS-006: Verify successful signin and user session

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_invalid_username
test-method.description: NEG-001: Verify signin fails with invalid username

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_invalid_password
test-method.description: NEG-002: Verify signin fails with invalid password

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_both_invalid_credentials
test-method.description: NEG-003: Verify signin fails with both invalid username and password

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_empty_username
test-method.description: NEG-004: Verify signin fails with empty username

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_empty_password
test-method.description: NEG-005: Verify signin fails with empty password

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_both_fields_empty
test-method.description: NEG-006: Verify signin fails with both fields empty

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_sql_injection_in_username
test-method.description: NEG-007: Verify signin fails with SQL injection attempt in username

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_xss_attempt_in_username
test-method.description: NEG-008: Verify signin fails with XSS attempt in username

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_very_long_username
test-method.description: NEG-009: Verify signin fails with very long username

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_username_containing_only_spaces
test-method.description: NEG-010: Verify signin fails with username containing only spaces

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_case_sensitive_password_mismatch
test-method.description: NEG-011: Verify signin fails with case-sensitive password mismatch

test-method.name: verify_signin_fails_with_invalid_password_format
test-method.description: NEG-012: Verify signin fails with invalid password format
